summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Care Recruitment Agency website and compliance portal. All major functionality working correctly including public pages, authentication, and portal features.
passed_tests: All 19 backend API endpoints working (100% success rate)
Public homepage loads with hero section and navigation
All public pages accessible (About, Services, Recruitment, Compliance, Contact)
Login page displays with email/password and Google OAuth options
Admin login with demo credentials (admin@osabea.care / admin123) working
Portal Dashboard loads with stats cards and quick actions
Employees page displays employee list correctly
Employee profile tabs functional (Overview, Checklist, Documents, Policies, Training)
